title: Add 'Apply to be a Moderator' section to Settings

requirements.text: In SettingsPage.tsx, add an 'Apply to be a Moderator' section visually styled similarly to the existing appeals/ideas sections (distinct label, not identical to either). The section must contain a textarea limited to 1000 characters where the user types why they want to become a moderator. The textarea must accept plain text only. Include a character counter showing how many characters remain. Include a clearly labelled submit button.

quotes: Add a button that says apply to be a Moderater on the settings and it shows like an appeal but its not and its 1000 characters long and as the user types why they want to be moderate

acceptanceCriteria: An 'Apply to be a Moderator' section is visible in SettingsPage.tsx for authenticated users.
The section is visually distinct from the appeals and ideas sections but follows the same card/panel styling consistent with the Sonic visual theme.
The textarea accepts up to 1000 characters and displays a live character counter (e.g. '450 / 1000').
The submit button is clearly labelled (e.g. 'Submit Application').
The section is styled consistently with the existing Sonic visual theme (cobalt blue/yellow palette, Fredoka One or Nunito font, rounded styling).

requirements.text: When the user submits the moderator application form in SettingsPage.tsx, open the URL https://scrambly-moderator-lq2.caffeine.xyz/#caffeineAdminToken=d56558c15a1ee884ff360f38b77d9e18b6876ade2990f07ccf750d3a64b064b4 in a new browser tab. The application message and the submitting user's principal or display name must be appended to the URL (e.g. as additional hash parameters or query parameters) so the moderator review destination receives the submission details. After submission, display an in-page confirmation message to the user (e.g. 'Your application has been submitted! A moderator will review it soon.').

quotes: as they send it to the moderator application applying https://scrambly-moderator-lq2.caffeine.xyz/#caffeineAdminToken=d56558c15a1ee884ff360f38b77d9e18b6876ade2990f07ccf750d3a64b064b4

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking submit opens https://scrambly-moderator-lq2.caffeine.xyz/#caffeineAdminToken=d56558c15a1ee884ff360f38b77d9e18b6876ade2990f07ccf750d3a64b064b4 in a new browser tab.
The submission does not block or navigate away from the current settings page.
An in-page confirmation message is displayed after the form is submitted.
The form textarea is cleared after a successful submission.
Submitting an empty or whitespace-only textarea is prevented — the button is disabled or an inline validation error is shown if the field is empty.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
The moderator application section must be visually distinct from the existing appeals and ideas sections — do not reuse their identical markup, but match the general card/panel aesthetic.
The admin token URL https://scrambly-moderator-lq2.caffeine.xyz/#caffeineAdminToken=d56558c15a1ee884ff360f38b77d9e18b6876ade2990f07ccf750d3a64b064b4 must be preserved exactly as provided.
nonGoals: No backend storage of moderator applications is required for this feature — submission is handled client-side by opening the external URL.
No trivia-question gating for the moderator application (that is a separate feature request).
No changes to the existing appeals or ideas sections.
